html:
Exclusive to:  

Glommer's Wings are a nonperishable Item dropped by Glommer and used to craft the Old Bell. It is renewable as the player can obtain one each Full Moon by killing Glommer.

The Wings can also be used as fuel for fires or the Ice Flingomatic.

Because Glommer's Wings can be burned to ash, killing Glommer with fire is ill-advised.

Trivia

  • In Don't Starve Together, since the Old Bell was removed, Glommer's Wings can only be used as fuel for fire.

–Wilson

–Wolfgang
“Even his wings are small and cheery.”
–Wendy
“ESPECIALLY RIGID WINGS”
–WX-78
“The pennons of that strange specimen.”
–Wickerbottom
“Unsurprisingly, the wings are slimy.”
–Woodie
“They're sticky.”
–Maxwell
“How did these wings support such a bulky creature?”
–Wagstaff
“Öhh, löök what the gööber left för me.”
–Wigfrid
“I wish I'd at least ended up with wings. Sigh.”
–Webber
“Sigh. Fly no more, friend.”
–Walani
“A tiny delicacy.”
–Warly
“'E left me a lil gooey treasure.”
–Woodlegs

“So teeny”
–Wormwood

–Wheeler
“You can see right through’em.”
–Winona

“Big bug had weird tiny wings, flurt.”
–Wurt
“How did he fly with these little wings?”
–Walter
“I'm just not going to think about where they came from!”
–Wanda
Glommer's Wings are a nonperishable Item dropped by Glommer and used to craft the Old Bell. It is renewable as the player can obtain one each Full Moon by killing Glommer.
The Wings can also be used as fuel for fires or the Ice Flingomatic.
Because Glommer's Wings can be burned to ash, killing Glommer with fire is ill-advised.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Trivia[edit | edit source]
In Don't Starve Together, since the Old Bell was removed, Glommer's Wings can only be used as fuel for fire.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đôi Cánh của Glommer là một Vật phẩm không thể hư hỏng được Glommer đánh rơi và dùng để chế tạo Chuông Cũ. Nó có thể được tái tạo vì người chơi có thể nhận được một cái vào mỗi dịp Trăng tròn bằng cách giết Glommer.

'''Glommer's Wings''' are a nonperishable [[Item]] dropped by [[Glommer]] and used to craft the [[Old Bell]]. It is renewable as the player can obtain one each [[Full Moon]] by killing Glommer.

The Wings can also be used as fuel for fires or the [[Ice Flingomatic]].

Because Glommer's Wings can be burned to ash, killing Glommer with fire is ill-advised.

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Glommer's Wings
|item2 = Glommer's Flower
|tool = Blueprint
|result = Old Bell
|dlc = Reign of Giants}}

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* In ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', since the [[Old Bell]] was removed, Glommer's Wings can only be used as fuel for fire.
